Home / Lore / People / Larae Barrett

person

Larae Barrett

The former Rikers leader whose death leaves the faction leaderless and divided into multiple sub-groups.

Connectionnot applicable Continuitydivision game universe Canon scopegame canon Verificationsource reviewed Reviewed2026-07-19

Riker succession

Barrett's death is the turning point between the first game's unified Rikers and the splinter groups encountered later, including James Dragov's Lower Manhattan force. [1][2]

Claim ledger

Every factual statement below must retain at least one traceable source.

  1. confirmed

    The official faction recap says Larae Barrett led the Rikers' campaign of vengeance and destruction after Green Poison struck. [1]

  2. confirmed

    The Division killed Barrett, leaving the Rikers leaderless and causing the faction to split into multiple sub-groups. [1][2]

Related records

  • Rikersformer leader of

Sources

  1. [1] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: Meet the Factions of Warlords of New York — Ubisoft News (2020-02-19). Accessed 2026-07-19.
  2. [2] The Division 2 – State of the Game Recap: The Story So Far — Ubisoft News (2020-02-05). Accessed 2026-07-19.
Editorial status: The title follows the established character spelling; one recap body renders the surname as Barret.

Unofficial, source-led research into The Division universe and its real-world influences.
